title: Should You Retain Brown & Brown (BRO) Stock in Your Portfolio?
text: Brown & Brown (BRO) is well poised for growth on the back of favorable growth estimates new businesses, better customer retention and low leverage.

title: Brown & Brown (BRO) Down 14.8% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
text: Brown & Brown (BRO) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Brown & Brown (BRO) Strengthens Portfolio With CTI Buyout
text: Brown & Brown's (BRO) unit Brown & Brown of Massachusetts acquires Claim Technologies to assess the performance of administrators of employee benefit plans.

title: 5 Insurance Brokers Benefiting From Rising Demand
text: Increased demand for insurance products, given an aging population, baby boomers and millennials and the adoption of technology should drive insurance brokers like MMC, AON, AJG, WTW and BRO.
